message:
feat(rch-wkr): add --json and --format flags to benchmark subcommand

The rchd daemon sends `rch-wkr benchmark --json` to workers, but the
benchmark subcommand previously accepted no arguments, causing exit
code 2 on all workers. This led to 1000+ consecutive benchmark failures
per worker across the fleet.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
